title: [HIDDEN]Certification Types
heading: [HIDDEN]Certification Types
content:

> ✋
> 
> ### 
> 
> Integration Type Matters!
> 
> [](#integration-type-matters)
> 
> If you are certifying for Clever Library, see the guides below.
> 
> If you are certifying for Secure Sync, Single-Sign On, or LMS Connect, reach out to your Application Success Manager or to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#365746465a5f5557425f59581b5f5842534453454276555a534053441855595b) to secure a Clever Complete agreement.
> 
> See more here: [Certification Types](https://dev.clever.com/docs/certification-types)

# 

Table of Contents

[](#table-of-contents)

  

* * *

# 

Types of Certifications

[](#types-of-certifications)

There are three types of Clever integrations, each with a certification process:

1.  **Clever Library**
2.  **Clever Single Sign-On (SSO)**
3.  **Clever Secure Sync**
4.  **Clever LMS Connect**

If you are unsure which integration type you need to build, please use the [Integration Picker](https://airtable.com/shrUp8n3bkdGIBkGh) to help inform your decision.

* * *

# 

Clever Library

[](#clever-library)

**Clever Library** installs are teacher-initiated. Teachers install your application through the [Clever Library](https://clever.com/library) and can provision accounts on-demand for themselves and their students.

Data received:

-   Teacher name
-   Teacher email
-   Student first name and last initial
-   Section (class) information

To learn more, see the [Library Certification Guide](https://dev.clever.com/v0.31/docs/library-certification-guide).

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Working with Teachers**
> 
> [](#working-with-teachers)
> 
> Learn how applications connect with teachers:
> 
> -   [For Teachers: Adding Applications](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/360013488672?language=en_US)

* * *

# 

Clever Single Sign-On

[](#clever-single-sign-on)

**Clever Single Sign-On** connections are managed in the Clever Dashboard by district administrators. Your application can be added through the _Request Application_ page of the Clever Dashboard. This integration facilitates SSO for any Clever user scoped by a district administrator.

Data received:

-   User first name
-   User last name
-   Email address

To learn more, see the [District SSO Certification Guide](doc:district-sso-certification-guide).

* * *

# 

Clever Secure Sync

[](#clever-secure-sync)

**Clever Secure Sync** connections are also managed in the Clever Dashboard by district administrators. Your application can be added through the _Request Application_ page of the Clever Dashboard. This integration allows you to pull district, school, user, and enrollment data via the Clever API, provided the district shares the data.

Data received:

-   User personal and demographic data
-   Rostering data

To learn more, see the [Secure Sync Certification Guide](doc:secure-sync-certification-guide).

* * *

# 

Clever LMS Connect

[](#clever-lms-connect)

**Clever LMS Connect** connections are also managed in the Clever Dashboard by district administrators. Your application can be added through the _Applications > LMS Connect_ page of the Clever Dashboard. This integration allows you perform grade and assignment writeback to the district's LMS. It also supports user LTI SSO via the district's LMS.

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Available Fields**
> 
> [](#available-fields)
> 
> For a detailed list of available fields in each integration type, see the [Clever API Schema](https://clever.com/schema).

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Multiple Certifications**
> 
> [](#multiple-certifications)
> 
> You can be certified for more than one integration type:
> 
> -   For Clever Library integration, submit for certification once.
> -   For Clever Library and Secure Sync integration built simultaneously, submit for certification separately.
> -   For District SSO and Secure Sync integration built simultaneously, submit for certification once.
> -   For Clever LMS Connect -----
> -   For any combination of integration types built separately, submit for each certification separately.

> 📘
> 
> ### 
> 
> **Working with Districts**
> 
> [](#working-with-districts)
> 
> Learn how applications connect with districts:
> 
> -   [For District Admins: Add or Remove Apps](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/203114997?language=en_US)
> -   [For App Partners: Inviting & Connecting Districts to your App](https://support.clever.com/hc/s/articles/215120718?language=en_US)
